message:
chore: update model references to claude-sonnet-4-6 and harden onboard shell scripts

Model name updates (claude-3.7-sonnet → claude-sonnet-4-6):
- ntm-core-lesson.tsx: update agent model identifiers and spawn messages
- rust-proxy-lesson.tsx: update body preview model string
- newproj.sh: update default Claude settings model in project scaffolding
- screen_progress.sh: update Claude settings model in progress screen

Shell script robustness (onboard.sh):
- Replace echo with printf in signal handler cleanup for POSIX portability
- Fix whitespace alignment in cleanup function comments
- Disable bat pager (--paging=never) to prevent blocking on long lessons
- Remove redundant comment above gum format call

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -273,7 +273,7 @@ const AGENTS: AgentPaneV2[] = [

     id: "cc1",
     name: "Claude-1",

+    model: "claude-sonnet-4-6",
     flag: "--cc",
     color: "#f97316",
     colorLight: "#fdba74",
@@ -292,7 +292,7 @@ const AGENTS: AgentPaneV2[] = [

@@ -352,8 +352,8 @@ const TOTAL_STEPS = 8;
 
 const STEP_COMMANDS: Record<number, string> = {
   0: "ntm spawn myproject --cc=2 --cod=1 --gmi=1",
-  1: "Spawning Claude-1 (claude-3.7-sonnet)...",
-  2: "Spawning Claude-2 (claude-3.7-sonnet)...",
+  1: "Spawning Claude-1 (claude-sonnet-4-6)...",
+  2: "Spawning Claude-2 (claude-sonnet-4-6)...",
   3: "Spawning Codex (codex-mini)...",
   4: "Spawning Gemini (gemini-2.5-pro)...",
   5: 'ntm send myproject "Analyze this codebase"',

@@ -31,10 +31,10 @@ MENU_SEPARATOR="─────────────────────
 # Signal Handling — clean exit on Ctrl+C / SIGTERM
 # ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
 _onboard_cleanup() {
-    printf '\033[?25h' 2>/dev/null  # Restore cursor visibility
-    stty echo 2>/dev/null || true   # Re-enable echo if gum disabled it
-    echo ""                         # Clean newline so shell prompt isn't mangled
-    exit 130                        # Standard SIGINT exit code
+    printf '\033[?25h' 2>/dev/null   # Restore cursor visibility
+    stty echo 2>/dev/null || true    # Re-enable echo if gum disabled it
+    printf '\n' 2>/dev/null || true  # Clean newline so shell prompt isn't mangled
+    exit 130                         # Standard SIGINT exit code
 }
 trap _onboard_cleanup INT TERM HUP
 
@@ -1560,10 +1560,9 @@ render_markdown() {
         # Prevent glow's built-in pager from blocking on long lessons
         PAGER="cat" glow -s dark "$file"
     elif has_gum; then
-        # Use gum format for markdown rendering
         gum format -t markdown < "$file"
     elif command -v bat &>/dev/null; then
-        bat --style=plain --language=markdown "$file"
+        bat --paging=never --style=plain --language=markdown "$file"
     else
         # Basic markdown rendering with sed
         sed \

@@ -795,7 +795,7 @@ EOF

             cat > .claude/settings.local.json << 'EOF'
 {

   "permissions": {
     "allow_file_read": true,
     "allow_file_write": true,

   "permissions": {
     "allow_file_read": true,
     "allow_file_write": true,
